title: Globalisation and migration
summary: 9699 — types of migration, push/pull factors, and impacts on sending and receiving societies.
learningObjectives: Distinguish economic, refugee, and family migration.
Explain push and pull factors globally.
Analyse impacts on host and origin countries.
Evaluate policies on immigration and integration.

simpleExplanation.title: People on the move
simpleExplanation.summary: Global labour markets, conflict, and family reunification drive migration — with economic and cultural effects in both directions.

sections.content: **Migration** (8.2) links **7.x globalisation** to **6.3 ethnicity**. Avoid conflating **economic migrant** and **refugee**.
